title: Create a new account and reach the dashboard
description: A guest can register successfully and land on the authenticated products dashboard with workspace data available.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the registration details with a valid new account
Submit the registration form
Verify an account created confirmation is visible
Verify the authenticated products dashboard is displayed

title: Log in and access the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can log in with valid credentials and reach the main products dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated products dashboard is displayed

title: Filter products and see refreshed analytics
description: An analyst can filter discovered products by country, category, and date range and see the list and analytics refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a country filter value
Select a category filter value
Select a valid date range
Verify the product list is updated
Verify refreshed analytics are displayed

title: Open a product and review its analysis
description: An analyst can open a product detail modal and review the timeline chart and marketing strategy analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Select a product from the dashboard
Verify the product details modal is displayed
Verify the timeline chart and marketing strategy analysis are displayed

title: Open the dashboard after starting from a protected route
description: A user who lands on a protected route without an active session is sent to login and can then reach the dashboard after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the login page is displayed
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated products dashboard is displayed

title: Update a saved product rating and notes
description: A user can change a saved product's rating stars and notes and see the updated information persist in the view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /saved-ads
Select a saved product
Update the rating stars
Update the notes
Save the changes
Verify the updated rating and notes are visible

title: Update a saved product actual price
description: A user can change a saved product's actual price and confirm the updated value is shown afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /saved-ads
Select a saved product
Update the actual price with a valid amount
Save the new price
Verify the updated actual price is visible

title: Collapse and expand the filter panel
description: An analyst can hide and restore the filter panel while continuing to browse products.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Collapse the filter panel
Expand the filter panel
Verify the filter panel is visible
Verify the products list remains visible

title: Browse international products
description: An authenticated user can open the international products listing and view international product results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /international-products
Verify the international products listing is displayed
Verify product results are visible

title: Review saved ad details
description: A user can open a saved product and view its metrics and marketing strategy analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /saved-ads
Select a saved product
Verify the saved product details are displayed
Verify the product metrics and marketing strategy analysis are displayed

title: Open workspace settings and return to analytics
description: A workspace member can access workspace or account settings and then return to the analytics views.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /settings
Verify the settings page is displayed
Navigate to /
Verify the products dashboard is displayed

title: Review admin users and roles
description: An admin user can open the users management area and review the list of users and their roles.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/users
Verify the admin users page is displayed
Verify a list of users and roles is visible

title: Manage workspace invites and preferences
description: A workspace member can open workspace management, review invitations or preferences, and confirm the workspace area is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /workspace
Verify the workspace management page is displayed
Verify workspace preferences or invitation controls are visible

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: A user entering invalid credentials stays on the login page and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with an invalid email
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify validation feedback is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page
